title: EcoXpert
description: Take full control of your server’s economy — intelligent, stable, and impossible to break.
body:
# EcoXpert Pro

**The intelligent economy plugin that never collapses**

EcoXpert Pro is a next-generation **Minecraft economy plugin** built for server owners who want **stability, intelligence, and full control** over their in-game economy.

It uses advanced algorithms and real economic logic to **prevent inflation, collapse, and imbalance**. Your server economy evolves naturally — adapting to player behavior, managing crises automatically, and keeping everything balanced.

No more servers where everyone ends up with millions.  
EcoXpert guarantees an economy that **lives, breathes, and stays healthy**.

---

## ⚙️ Installation

1. Download the latest `EcoXpert-Pro.jar`
2. Place it in your `/plugins` folder
3. Install **Vault** (required dependency)
4. Restart the server
5. EcoXpert will auto-detect and integrate with your current setup.

* Supports EssentialsX and CMI out of the box  
* Imports balances automatically if enabled  
* Fully compatible with existing Vault setups  

---

## 🎯 Why Choose EcoXpert?

Most economy plugins eventually collapse — prices skyrocket, money loses value, and balance is lost.  
EcoXpert Pro is different: it manages your economy like a real-world financial system.

- ✅ Prevents inflation and collapse  
- ✅ Analyzes player behavior dynamically  
- ✅ Adapts to your server’s population  
- ✅ Provides diagnostics and analytics  
- ✅ Never breaks your server (safe mode)  

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### 🧠 Economic Intelligence System
- Living economy cycles (Growth, Boom, Recession, Depression)
- Predictive algorithms and AI-like adjustments
- Player economic personalities (Saver, Trader, Investor, etc.)
- Smart interventions and crisis prevention
- Real-time inflation and health metrics

### 🏦 Advanced Banking System
- Tiered accounts (Basic → Platinum)
- Compound interest with anti-abuse controls
- Daily deposit/withdraw limits
- Account freezing, audit logs, transaction hashing

### 📈 Dynamic Market Engine
- Real supply and demand pricing
- Trend analysis with volatility control
- GUI Market with filters, categories, and live data
- Fixed-price listings via Order Book
- Market events: booms, shortages, luxury demand, etc.

### 💰 Loans & Credit System
- Smart loan offers with risk analysis
- Automatic repayment schedules
- Late penalties and notifications
- Integrated with the banking system

### 🌍 Integrations
- **EssentialsX**, **CMI**, **Towny**, **Lands**, **WorldGuard**, **Jobs Reborn**, **Slimefun**, **mcMMO**
- Region-based market rules (via Towny, Lands, WG)
- PlaceholderAPI support for dynamic HUDs and menus

### 🖥️ Admin Dashboard & GUI
- `/ecoadmin` – Economy management
- `/ecoevents` – Manage global market events
- `/market` – Open GUI with filters and trends
- `/bankgui` & `/loansgui` – Manage finances easily

### 🔒 Stability & Safety
- Auto safe mode — never crashes your server
- Conflict detection with other economy systems
- Anti-exploit transaction protection
- Full audit trail

---

## 📚 Commands

| Command | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `/ecox balance [player]` | Check player balance |
| `/ecox pay <player> <amount>` | Send money |
| `/market buy|sell <item> [amount]` | Trade items |
| `/market prices` | Show current market prices |
| `/bank deposit|withdraw <amount>` | Manage bank account |
| `/loans request|pay|status` | Manage player loans |
| `/ecoxpert economy status|health|forecast` | View economy diagnostics |
| `/ecoxpert integrations` | Check plugin integrations |

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `ecoxpert.user` | Base permission |
| `ecoxpert.economy.balance` | Check balance |
| `ecoxpert.economy.pay` | Send money |
| `ecoxpert.market.*` | Market access |
| `ecoxpert.bank.*` | Banking features |
| `ecoxpert.loans.request` | Loan requests |
| `ecoxpert.admin.*` | Full admin access |
| `ecoxpert.admin.market` | Market management |
| `ecoxpert.admin.economy` | Economy control |
| `ecoxpert.admin.bank` | Bank administration |

---

## 🧩 API & Placeholders

- `%ecox_economy_health%` — Global economy health
- `%ecox_inflation_rate%` — Inflation rate (%)
- `%ecox_cycle%` — Current economic cycle
- `%ecox_market_activity%` — Market activity
- `%ecox_balance%` — Player balance
- `%ecox_role%`, `%ecox_role_level%` — Player profession data

### Developer API
Access real-time economy data, forecast cycles, and listen to events such as:
- `EconomyCycleChangeEvent`
- `MarketPriceChangeEvent`
- `WealthTaxAppliedEvent`

---

## 🧰 Requirements

- **Java:** 17+  
- **Server:** Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia  
- **Minecraft:** 1.19.4 – 1.21.8+  
- **Dependency:** Vault  

---

## 📊 Monitoring & Analytics

- `/ecoxpert economy diagnostics` – Run full system diagnostics  
- `/ecoxpert economy status` – Check operation mode  
- `/ecoxpert economy anomalies` – Detect economic issues  
- Integrated bStats analytics and economy health metrics  

---

## 🏆 Why Server Owners Love EcoXpert

- Intelligent, self-balancing economy system  
- Professional GUIs for market, bank, and events  
- Zero performance impact (async operations)  
- Perfect integration with existing setups  
- Reliable, actively maintained, and premium-quality  

---

> “Because your economy deserves intelligence.”  
> **EcoXpert Pro © 2025 — Premium Economy Plugin for Spigot Servers**
